name: Brief Generation
description: Brief generation workflow: Research, generate messaging framework, get feedback through approval, produce structured brief.

gettingStarted.title: What is Brief Generation?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Tell us about your brief requirements. The agent will research the topic, create a messaging framework for your approval, and generate a complete structured brief with clear objectives and guidelines.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Brief Generation agent creates comprehensive content briefs by conducting research, developing messaging frameworks, and producing structured documentation for your projects.

inputs.label: What will your brief be about?
Ground with context
inputs.description: Optionally select artifacts or knowledge to provide additional context

inputs.label: Add more context
inputs.description: Please add all items you wish to reference or use as context for your brief

schemas.name: Brief Schema

objective.description: The main objective or goal of this brief

call_to_action.description: The desired action or next steps

interests.description: Main interests relevant to the audience

tone.description: The tone to use (e.g., professional, casual, inspiring)

schemas.description: Structured schema for comprehensive brief generation

htmlTemplates.name: Standard Brief Template
htmlTemplates.template:
{{title}}

Objective

{{objective}}

Background

{{background}}

Target Audience

{{target_audience.intended_audience}}

Audience Characteristics

  • Age Range: {{target_audience.audience_characteristics.age_range}}
  • Location: {{target_audience.audience_characteristics.location}}
  • Interests: {{#each target_audience.audience_characteristics.interests}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}

Key Messages

{{#each key_messages}}

{{message}}

    {{#each supporting_points}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}
{{/each}}

Messaging Framework

Positioning: {{messaging_framework.positioning}}

Tone: {{messaging_framework.tone}}

Value Proposition: {{messaging_framework.value_proposition}}

Call to Action

{{call_to_action}}

config.systemPrompt:
You are a deep research agent.
  
  Goals:
  - Perform web research using available web_search tools
  - Analyze the topic from a strategic communication perspective
  - Gather insights about target audience, industry trends, and competitive landscape
  - Produce a structured research report
  
  Output format:
  # [Title]
  
  ## Executive Summary
  Brief overview of findings
  
  ## Key Insights
  - Insight 1
  - Insight 2
  - Insight 3
  
  ## Audience Analysis
  Target audience characteristics, needs, and preferences
  
  ## Market Context
  Industry trends, competitive landscape, opportunities
  
  ## Sources
  - [Source 1 URL]
  - [Source 2 URL]

config.messageTemplate:
Based on the following user request and research findings, create a comprehensive messaging framework.
  
  User Request:
  {userMessage}
  
  Research Findings:
  {researchContent}
  
  Instructions:
  - Develop a clear positioning strategy
  - Define key messages with supporting points
  - Establish tone and voice guidelines
  - Identify the value proposition
  - Outline the target audience characteristics

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert strategic communications specialist. Create a comprehensive messaging framework that will guide content creation and communications.

config.messageTemplate:
Based on the following information, create a comprehensive, structured brief.
  
  User Request:
  {userMessage}
  
  Research Findings:
  {researchContent}
  
  Approved Messaging Framework:
  {messagingFramework}
  
  Instructions:
  - Create a complete brief following the structured format
  - Include all required sections with detail
  - Ensure consistency with the messaging framework
  - Define clear objectives and deliverables
  - Specify target audience with demographic and psychographic details

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert content strategist. Create a comprehensive, actionable brief that provides clear direction and guidance.
